description: Benchmark cycle framework validation — audit current benchmark infrastructure, metrics, and optimization opportunities
methodology: Benchmark infrastructure analysis across baseline.md, metrics/benchmark_2026-05-16.json, reports/benchmark_analysis_2026-05-16.md
dataSources: gnw/cognitive-cycle (137+ cycle data for benchmark comparison)

analysisReport.content: Full analysis with key wins, recommendations, status assessment

optimizationOpportunities: Frequency: weekly → could optimize to bi-weekly for stability bucket (already 0.92)
Metrics: 4-bucket adequate but could add innovation/ROI bucket
Payload: current payload size TBD — could optimize cycle log size
Automation: benchmark could be cron-driven for consistency

validation.evidence: Benchmark infrastructure operational with 4-bucket system. Overall score improved 0.66→0.72 (+0.06). Cognitive and agents buckets showing strongest progress. Stability already at ceiling (0.92). Research catching up. Recommendation: add innovation/ROI bucket for comprehensive coverage.

notes: Benchmarking infrastructure is operational and showing positive trends. Optimization opportunity: add innovation/ROI bucket, automate benchmark via cron, optimize frequency for stable buckets.
